Video.summary: Vanessa Gianfrancesco prepares her favorite Chinese-inspired brunch dishes; shrimp dumplings; pork bao buns combine roast pork, delicious hoisin, fluffy steamed buns, and crunchy fresh veggies; homemade congee topped with crispy beef and scallions.
Video.title: Dim Sum Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa shares her favourite Vegan Brunch recipes.
Video.title: Vegan Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates an international menu with brunch recipes from around the world.
Video.title: More Brunch Around The World

Video.summary: Vanessa shares mid-morning bread recipes.
Video.title: Bread for Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates a delicious seafood brunch menu.
Video.title: Seafood Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates an international menu with brunch recipes from around the world.
Video.title: Brunch Around the World

Video.summary: Vanessa Giangrancesco shares her favorite Italian Brunch recipes.
Video.title: Italian Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates a brunch menu inspired by the Middle East.
Video.title: Middle Eastern Brunch

Video.summary: Champagne, lobster and homemade scones, Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up an indulgent brunch.
Video.title: Champagne Brunch

Video.summary: Brunch is the most important meal of the weekend; Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up healthy and delicious recipes that'll awaken the taste buds.
Video.title: Healthy Start

Video.summary: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up her twist on a traditional pancake brunch with savoury, sweet and crispy recipes.
Video.title: Pancake Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four decadent recipes including an indulgent Breakfast Poutine and chocolate Stuffed French Toast.
Video.title: Up All Night Brunch

Video.summary: Skip the utensils and gather for chef Vanessa's Pick Up Your Brunch; Featuring Sticky Pull-Apart Praline Bread and an extra cheesy Monte Cristo Sandwich.
Video.title: Pick Up Your Brunch

Video.summary: Inspired by flaky, buttery and chocolaty dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la.
Video.title: French Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa Dianfrancesco brings the heat to her brunch table with southern-style recipes including a Huevos Divorciados and Fried Chicken and Waffles.
Video.title: Southern Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa cooks up four classic wholesome and hearty dishes for her farmhouse brunch.
Video.title: Farmhouse Brunch

Video.summary: A menu that dads and kids can make for Mother's Day.
Video.title: Mother's Day

Video.summary: Vanessa and Stefania plan a rustic Italian menu with a table to match; there's nonna's salad, Sunday sauce, rapini with garlic and chili, Sicilian sea bass and so much more!
Video.title: Rustico Italiano

Video.summary: Vanessa plans a brunch menu with a table to match; there's a blueberry smoothie bowl, potato rosti, shakshuka, stuffed French toast and so much more!
Video.title: Brunch for a Bunch

Video.summary: Vanessa plans an autumn-themed menu with a table to match; there's blood orange and broccolini salad, butternut squash mac 'n' cheese, cranberry-rosemary chicken thighs, sheet pan curried cauliflower and so much more!
Video.title: Autumn Feast

Video.summary: Vanessa and Stefania plan a summer-themed menu with a table to match; there's cherry tomato pasta, grilled steak salad, chilled lobster wraps and so much more!
Video.title: Summer Lovin'

Video.summary: Vanessa plans a Spanish tapas-themed menu with a table to match! There's lamb meatballs, battered cod with peppers, garlic shrimp, fried eggplant with honey and so much more!
Video.title: Tapas Night

Video.summary: Vanessa and Stefania plan an afternoon tea with a table to match; there's tea sandwiches, scones with jam and clotted cream, mini quiche, Steffy's banana cake and so much more!
Video.title: Afternoon Tea

Video.summary: Vanessa plans a winter-themed menu with a table to match; there's cheddar biscuits, a detox kale salad, roast beef au jus, root vegetable mash and so much more!
Video.title: Winter Feast

Video.summary: Vanessa plans a Mediterranean mezze-themed menu with a table to match; there's kofta, hummus, tabbouleh, fattoush, muhammara and so much more!
Video.title: Mezze Marathon

Video.summary: Vanessa plans a Cajun-themed menu with a table to match; there's chili-garlic-cilantro shrimp, fajita rice, cornbread, tomato salad and so much more!
Video.title: Cajun Night
